info.title: MySweldo HRIS API
info.description: RESTful API for employee, attendance, leave, and payroll management

tags.name: Payroll Runs
tags.description: Payroll run processing and management endpoints

tags.name: Role Management
tags.description: Manage user roles and permissions. Requires IT or SUPERUSER role.

get.summary: Get income tax bracket by ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific income tax bracket. Requires PAYROLL role.

put.description: Update an existing income tax bracket. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete an income tax bracket. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific SSS rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

put.description: Update an existing SSS rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete an SSS rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific role by its ID. Requires IT or SUPERUSER role.

put.description: Update an existing role. Requires IT or SUPERUSER role.

delete.description: Soft delete a role. Requires IT or SUPERUSER role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific position by its ID. Requires HR role.

put.description: Update an existing position's information. Requires HR role.

delete.description: Delete a position. Requires HR role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific PhilHealth rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

put.description: Update an existing PhilHealth rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete a PhilHealth rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific Pag-IBIG rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

put.description: Update an existing Pag-IBIG rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete a Pag-IBIG rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific overtime request by its ID
Retrieve a specific leave request by its ID
Retrieve a specific employee by their ID. Requires HR, IT, or PAYROLL role.

put.description: Update an existing employee's information. Requires HR role.

delete.description: Delete or deactivate an employee. Requires HR role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific department by its ID. Requires HR role.

put.description: Update an existing department's information. Requires HR role.

delete.description: Delete a department. Requires HR role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific deduction. Requires PAYROLL role.

put.description: Update an existing deduction. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete a deduction. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific contribution. Requires PAYROLL or HR role.

put.description: Update an existing contribution. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete a contribution. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a specific benefit. Requires PAYROLL or HR role.

put.description: Update an existing benefit. Requires PAYROLL role.

delete.description: Soft delete a benefit. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of user accounts with optional role filtering. Requires IT role.

post.description: Create a new user account. Requires IT role.

get.description: Retrieve all income tax brackets with pagination and filters. Requires PAYROLL role.

parameters.name: minIncome
parameters.description: Filter by minimum income (greater than or equal to)

parameters.name: maxIncome
parameters.description: Filter by maximum income (less than or equal to)

post.description: Create a new income tax bracket configuration. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve all SSS rates with pagination and filters. Requires PAYROLL role.

post.description: Create a new SSS rate with salary brackets. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve all user roles with pagination. Requires IT or SUPERUSER role.

post.description: Create a new user role. Requires IT or SUPERUSER role.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of positions. Requires HR role.

post.description: Create a new position. Requires HR role.

get.description: Retrieve all PhilHealth rates with pagination. Requires PAYROLL role.

parameters.name: effectiveDate
parameters.description: Filter by effective date (on or before)

post.description: Create a new PhilHealth rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of payroll runs with optional filters

post.description: Create a new payroll run
Generate payroll items for a specific payroll run

get.description: Retrieve all Pag-IBIG rates with pagination. Requires PAYROLL role.

parameters.name: effectiveDate
parameters.description: Filter by effective date (on or before)

post.description: Create a new Pag-IBIG rate. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve all overtime requests with optional date filters and pagination. Requires HR or SUPERUSER role.

post.description: Create a new overtime request for the authenticated employee

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of leave requests for the authenticated employee

post.description: Submit a new leave request

get.description: Retrieve leave credits for the authenticated employee

post.description: Set up initial leave credits for an employee. Requires HR role. Returns a list of created leave credits.
Upload a CSV file to import users via batch job. Returns job execution ID for tracking. Restricted to IT role only.
Upload a CSV file to import employees via batch job. Returns job execution ID for tracking.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of employees with optional filters. Requires HR, IT, or PAYROLL role.

post.description: Create a new employee record. Requires HR role.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of departments. Requires HR role.

post.description: Create a new department. Requires HR role.

get.description: Retrieve all deductions with pagination. Requires PAYROLL role.

post.description: Create a new deduction. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve all contributions with pagination. Requires PAYROLL or HR role.

post.description: Create a new contribution. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.description: Retrieve all benefit with pagination. Requires PAYROLL or HR role.

post.description: Create a new benefit. Requires PAYROLL role.
Authenticate with email and password to receive a JWT token for accessing protected endpoints

get.description: Retrieve all attendance records with pagination and optional date filtering. Requires HR role.

post.description: Create a new attendance record for the authenticated employee

patch.description: Update the status of a specific payroll run
Update deductions for a specific payroll item
Update benefits for a specific payroll item
Update the status of an overtime request (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED). Requires HR, SUPERVISOR, or SUPERUSER role.
Approve or reject a leave request. Requires HR role.

get.summary: Lookup income tax bracket by income
get.description: Find the income tax bracket for a given income and date. Requires PAYROLL role.

get.summary: Get all brackets for a date
get.description: Retrieve all income tax brackets for a specific effective date. Requires PAYROLL role.
Find the SSS rate for a given salary and date. Requires PAYROLL role.
Retrieve the latest PhilHealth rate for a given date. Requires PAYROLL role.
Retrieve a specific payroll run by its ID
Retrieve a paginated list of payroll items for a specific payroll run
Retrieve a specific payroll item by its ID

delete.description: Delete a specific payroll item from a payroll run

get.description: Retrieve payroll records for the authenticated employee
Retrieve the latest Pag-IBIG rate for a given date. Requires PAYROLL role.
Retrieve overtime requests for employees supervised by the authenticated user. Requires SUPERVISOR role.
Retrieve overtime requests for the authenticated employee with pagination
Retrieve detailed information about a batch job execution including status and metrics.
Retrieve the authenticated employee's information
Retrieve attendance records for the authenticated employee
Retrieve attendance records for a specific employee. Requires HR or Payroll role.

delete.description: Delete all leave credits for a specific employee. Requires HR role.
